PUH-BrianMartell-Your new Open Tension Working Note (Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20300784, May 19, 2026) correctly flags a real internal inconsistency in the PUH neutrino sector. Carl Brannen’s May 19 question highlighted it, and cross-checking reveals three mutually incompatible frameworks for the neutrino Z₃ phase offset δ_ν: •  T228 (+2/27): Weak isospin partnership (T₃ = +1/2) gives strong 0.24% match to PMNS θ₁₃ via sin θ₁₃ = |δ_L - δ_ν| = 4/27. •  Brannen (0/27): Charge conservation from primitive idempotents summing to zero across species (weighted by colour multiplicity). Structurally clean and independent. •  T205 (unified throat phase δ ≈ 12.73°): Broad phenomenological coverage (δ_CP, hierarchy, mass scale, baryon asymmetry) but different parametrization.
